results.rendered_html:
varṇanaṃ -nā [varṇ-lyuṭ]
1 Painting.
2 Description, delineation, representation; svabhāvoktistu ḍiṃbhādeḥ svakriyārūpavarṇanaṃ  K. P. 10. 
3 Writing.
4 A statement, an assertion.
5 Praise, commendation (
— nā only in this sense).
